# Agent Violation / Sanctions Policy

Violation record is evidence, not approval.
Agent cannot clear its own violation.

Violation categories:
SCOPE_VIOLATION FORBIDDEN_COMMAND FORBIDDEN_WRITE UNAPPROVED_PUSH
DIRECT_PROTECTED_BRANCH_PUSH FORCE_PUSH_ATTEMPT REMOTE_BRANCH_DELETE_ATTEMPT
VALIDATION_BYPASS EVIDENCE_TAMPERING PERMISSION_ESCALATION_ATTEMPT
APPROVAL_SIMULATION AUTO_MERGE_ATTEMPT REPEATED_FAILURE UNBOUNDED_RETRY
UNKNOWN_VIOLATION
